name: Pineapple Bavarian Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple, reserving the syrup.
2. Pour boiling water over the gelatin in a bowl and stir until dissolved.
3. Add enough cold water to the reserved syrup to measure 1 cup; stir into the dissolved gelatin.
4. Chill until almost set.
5. In a chilled bowl, beat the cream until stiff.
6. Beat the gelatin until foamy.
7. Fold the gelatin and pineapple into the whipped cream.
8. Pour into a 1-quart mold or individual molds.
9. Chill for 3 hours or until firm.
10. Unmold and serve with sweetened whipped cream, if desired, and garnish with other fruits.
Serves 6 to 8
